fields.name: campaign.id
fields.description: Output only. The ID of the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.resource_name
fields.description: Immutable. The resource name of the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.name
fields.description: The name of the campaign. Required when creating new campaigns.

fields.name: campaign.status
fields.description: The status of the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.serving_status
fields.description: Output only. The ad serving status of the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.primary_status
fields.description: Output only. The primary status of the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.primary_status_reasons
fields.description: Output only. The reasons for the campaign's primary status.

fields.name: campaign.advertising_channel_type
fields.description: Immutable. The primary serving target for ads within the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.advertising_channel_sub_type
fields.description: Immutable. Optional refinement to advertising_channel_type.

fields.name: campaign.bidding_strategy_type
fields.description: Output only. The bidding strategy type.

fields.name: campaign.campaign_budget
fields.description: The budget resource name of the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.bidding_strategy
fields.description: Portfolio bidding strategy used by campaign.

fields.name: campaign.start_date
fields.description: The date when campaign started in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fields.name: campaign.end_date
fields.description: The last day of the campaign in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fields.name: campaign.final_url_suffix
fields.description: Suffix used to append query parameters to landing pages with parallel tracking.

fields.name: campaign.tracking_url_template
fields.description: The URL template for constructing a tracking URL.

fields.name: campaign.optimization_score
fields.description: Output only. Optimization score of the campaign (0-1).

fields.name: campaign.payment_mode
fields.description: Payment mode for the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.experiment_type
fields.description: Output only. The type of campaign: normal, draft, or experiment.

fields.name: campaign.base_campaign
fields.description: Output only. The resource name of the base campaign of a draft or experiment campaign.

fields.name: campaign.labels
fields.description: Output only. The resource names of labels attached to this campaign.

fields.name: campaign.network_settings.target_google_search
fields.description: Whether ads will be served with google.com search results.

fields.name: campaign.network_settings.target_search_network
fields.description: Whether ads will be served on partner sites in the Google Search Network.

fields.name: campaign.network_settings.target_content_network
fields.description: Whether ads will be served on placements in the Google Display Network.

fields.name: campaign.network_settings.target_partner_search_network
fields.description: Whether ads will be served on the Google Partner Network.

fields.name: campaign.manual_cpc.enhanced_cpc_enabled
fields.description: Whether bids are enhanced based on conversion optimizer data.

fields.name: campaign.target_cpa.target_cpa_micros
fields.description: Average CPA target in micros.

fields.name: campaign.target_cpa.cpc_bid_ceiling_micros
fields.description: Maximum CPC bid limit for Target CPA in micros.

fields.name: campaign.target_roas.target_roas
fields.description: The chosen revenue per unit of spend (ROAS target).

fields.name: campaign.target_roas.cpc_bid_ceiling_micros
fields.description: Maximum CPC bid limit for Target ROAS in micros.

fields.name: campaign.maximize_conversions.target_cpa_micros
fields.description: The target cost-per-action (CPA) in micros for Maximize Conversions.

fields.name: campaign.maximize_conversion_value.target_roas
fields.description: The target ROAS for Maximize Conversion Value.

fields.name: campaign.target_spend.target_spend_micros
fields.description: The spend target under which to maximize clicks, in micros.

fields.name: campaign.target_spend.cpc_bid_ceiling_micros
fields.description: Maximum CPC bid limit for Target Spend, in micros.

fields.name: campaign.target_impression_share.location
fields.description: The targeted location on the search results page.

fields.name: campaign.target_impression_share.location_fraction_micros
fields.description: The fraction of ads to be shown in the targeted location, in micros.

fields.name: campaign.target_impression_share.cpc_bid_ceiling_micros
fields.description: Maximum CPC bid limit for Target Impression Share, in micros.

fields.name: campaign.shopping_setting.merchant_id
fields.description: Immutable. ID of the Merchant Center account.

fields.name: campaign.shopping_setting.campaign_priority
fields.description: Priority of the shopping campaign (0, 1, or 2).

fields.name: campaign.shopping_setting.enable_local
fields.description: Whether to include local products.

fields.name: campaign.shopping_setting.feed_label
fields.description: Feed label of products to include in the campaign.

fields.name: campaign.geo_target_type_setting.positive_geo_target_type
fields.description: The setting for positive geotargeting in this campaign.

fields.name: campaign.geo_target_type_setting.negative_geo_target_type
fields.description: The setting for negative geotargeting in this campaign.

fields.name: campaign.url_expansion_opt_out
fields.description: Whether to opt out of URL expansion to more targeted URLs.

fields.name: campaign.percent_cpc.cpc_bid_ceiling_micros
fields.description: Maximum CPC bid limit for Percent CPC, in micros.

fields.name: campaign.percent_cpc.enhanced_cpc_enabled
fields.description: Adjusts the bid for each auction upward or downward based on likelihood to convert.

fields.name: ad_group.id
fields.description: Output only. The ID of the ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.resource_name
fields.description: Immutable. The resource name of the ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.name
fields.description: The name of the ad group. Required when creating a new ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.status
fields.description: The status of the ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.campaign
fields.description: Immutable. The campaign to which the ad group belongs.

fields.name: ad_group.type
fields.description: Immutable. The type of the ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.cpc_bid_micros
fields.description: The maximum CPC (cost-per-click) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group.cpm_bid_micros
fields.description: The maximum CPM (cost-per-thousand viewable impressions) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group.cpv_bid_micros
fields.description: The CPV (cost-per-view) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group.target_cpa_micros
fields.description: The target CPA (cost-per-acquisition) for this ad group, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group.target_roas
fields.description: The target ROAS (return-on-ad-spend) override for this ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.percent_cpc_bid_micros
fields.description: The percent CPC bid amount, expressed as a fraction of the advertised price.

fields.name: ad_group.effective_target_cpa_micros
fields.description: Output only. The effective target CPA (cost-per-acquisition), in micros.

fields.name: ad_group.effective_target_roas
fields.description: Output only. The effective target ROAS (return-on-ad-spend).

fields.name: ad_group.ad_rotation_mode
fields.description: The ad rotation mode of the ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.base_ad_group
fields.description: Output only. For draft or experiment ad groups, this field is the resource name of the base ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.labels
fields.description: Output only. The resource names of labels attached to this ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.targeting_setting.target_restrictions
fields.description: The per-targeting-dimension setting to restrict the reach of your campaign or ad group.

fields.name: ad_group.explorer_auto_optimizer_setting.opt_in
fields.description: Indicates whether the campaign or ad group is opted into using the auto optimizer.

fields.name: ad_group.primary_status
fields.description: Output only. The primary status of the ad group.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.resource_name
fields.description: Immutable. The resource name of the ad.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.status
fields.description: The status of the ad.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad_group
fields.description: Immutable. The ad group to which the ad belongs.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.id
fields.description: Output only. The ID of the ad.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.name
fields.description: Immutable. The name of the ad. This is only used to be able to identify the ad.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.type
fields.description: Output only. The type of ad.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.final_urls
fields.description: The list of possible final URLs after all cross-domain redirects.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.final_mobile_urls
fields.description: The list of possible final mobile URLs after all cross-domain redirects.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.tracking_url_template
fields.description: The URL template for constructing a tracking URL.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.display_url
fields.description: The URL that appears in the ad description for some ad formats.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.headlines
fields.description: List of text assets for headlines.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.descriptions
fields.description: List of text assets for descriptions.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part1
fields.description: The first part of the ad's headline.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part2
fields.description: The second part of the ad's headline.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part3
fields.description: The third part of the ad's headline.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description
fields.description: The ad's description.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description2
fields.description: The ad's second description.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.path1
fields.description: Text appended to the auto-generated visible URL with a delimiter.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.path2
fields.description: Text appended to path1 with a delimiter.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.policy_summary.approval_status
fields.description: Output only. The overall approval status of this ad, calculated based on the status of its individual policy topic entries.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.labels
fields.description: Output only. The resource names of labels attached to this ad.

fields.name: ad_group_ad.primary_status
fields.description: Output only. The primary status of the ad.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.criterion_id
fields.description: Output only. The ID of the criterion.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.resource_name
fields.description: Immutable. The resource name of the ad group criterion.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.status
fields.description: The status of the criterion.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.ad_group
fields.description: Immutable. The ad group to which the criterion belongs.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.type
fields.description: Output only. The type of the criterion.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.keyword.text
fields.description: Immutable. The text of the keyword (at most 80 characters and 10 words).

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.keyword.match_type
fields.description: The match type of the keyword.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.negative
fields.description: Immutable. Whether to target (false) or exclude (true) the criterion.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.bid_modifier
fields.description: The modifier for the bids when the criterion matches.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.cpc_bid_micros
fields.description: The CPC (cost-per-click) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.cpm_bid_micros
fields.description: The CPM (cost-per-thousand viewable impressions) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.cpv_bid_micros
fields.description: The CPV (cost-per-view) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.percent_cpc_bid_micros
fields.description: The percent CPC bid amount.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.effective_cpc_bid_micros
fields.description: Output only. The effective CPC (cost-per-click) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.effective_cpm_bid_micros
fields.description: Output only. The effective CPM (cost-per-thousand viewable impressions) bid, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.quality_info.quality_score
fields.description: Output only. The quality score. This field may not be populated if Google does not have enough information to determine a value (1-10).

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.quality_info.creative_quality_score
fields.description: Output only. The performance of the ad compared to other advertisers.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.quality_info.post_click_quality_score
fields.description: Output only. The quality score for the landing page.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.quality_info.search_predicted_ctr
fields.description: Output only. The click-through rate compared to that of other advertisers.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.labels
fields.description: Output only. The resource names of labels attached to this ad group criterion.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.position_estimates.estimated_add_clicks_at_first_position_cpc
fields.description: Output only. Estimate of how many clicks per week you might get by changing your keyword bid to the value in first_position_cpc_micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.position_estimates.first_page_cpc_micros
fields.description: Output only. The estimate of the CPC bid required for ad to be shown on first page of search results, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.position_estimates.first_position_cpc_micros
fields.description: Output only. The estimate of the CPC bid required for ad to be displayed in first position, in micros.

fields.name: ad_group_criterion.position_estimates.top_of_page_cpc_micros
fields.description: Output only. The estimate of the CPC bid required for ad to be displayed at the top of the first page of search results, in micros.

fields.name: campaign_budget.id
fields.description: Output only. The ID of the campaign budget.

fields.name: campaign_budget.resource_name
fields.description: Immutable. The resource name of the campaign budget.

fields.name: campaign_budget.name
fields.description: The name of the campaign budget.

fields.name: campaign_budget.amount_micros
fields.description: The amount of the budget, in the local currency for the account, in micros.

fields.name: campaign_budget.total_amount_micros
fields.description: The lifetime amount of the budget, in the local currency for the account, in micros.

fields.name: campaign_budget.status
fields.description: Output only. The status of this campaign budget.

fields.name: campaign_budget.delivery_method
fields.description: The delivery method that determines the rate at which the campaign budget is spent.

fields.name: campaign_budget.explicitly_shared
fields.description: Specifies whether the budget is explicitly shared.

fields.name: campaign_budget.reference_count
fields.description: Output only. The number of campaigns actively using the budget.

fields.name: campaign_budget.has_recommended_budget
fields.description: Output only. Indicates whether there is a recommended budget for this campaign budget.

fields.name: campaign_budget.recommended_budget_amount_micros
fields.description: Output only. The recommended budget amount. If no recommendation is available, this field is not set, in micros.

fields.name: campaign_budget.period
fields.description: Immutable. Period over which to spend the budget.

fields.name: campaign_budget.type
fields.description: Immutable. The type of the campaign budget.

fields.name: customer.id
fields.description: Output only. The ID of the customer.

fields.name: customer.resource_name
fields.description: Immutable. The resource name of the customer.

fields.name: customer.descriptive_name
fields.description: Optional, non-unique descriptive name of the customer.

fields.name: customer.currency_code
fields.description: Immutable. The currency in which the account operates. A subset of the currency codes from the ISO 4217 standard is supported.

fields.name: customer.time_zone
fields.description: Immutable. The local timezone ID of the customer.

fields.name: customer.status
fields.description: Output only. The status of the customer.

fields.name: customer.manager
fields.description: Output only. Whether the customer is a manager.

fields.name: customer.test_account
fields.description: Output only. Whether the customer is a test account.

fields.name: customer.auto_tagging_enabled
fields.description: Whether auto-tagging is enabled for the customer.

fields.name: customer.has_partners_badge
fields.description: Output only. Whether the Customer has a Partners program badge.

fields.name: customer.optimization_score
fields.description: Output only. Optimization score of the customer.

fields.name: customer.optimization_score_weight
fields.description: Output only. Optimization score weight of the customer.

fields.name: customer.call_reporting_setting.call_reporting_enabled
fields.description: Enable reporting of phone call events by redirecting them via Google System.

fields.name: customer.remarketing_setting.google_global_site_tag
fields.description: Output only. The Google global site tag.

fields.name: customer.tracking_url_template
fields.description: The URL template for constructing a tracking URL out of parameters.

fields.name: keyword_view.resource_name
fields.description: Output only. The resource name of the keyword view.

fields.name: metrics.clicks
fields.description: The number of clicks.

fields.name: metrics.impressions
fields.description: Count of how often your ad has appeared on a search results page or website on the Google Network.

fields.name: metrics.cost_micros
fields.description: The sum of your cost-per-click (CPC) and cost-per-thousand impressions (CPM) costs during this period, in micros.

fields.name: metrics.ctr
fields.description: The number of clicks your ad receives (Clicks) divided by the number of times your ad is shown (Impressions).

fields.name: metrics.average_cpc
fields.description: The total cost of all clicks divided by the total number of clicks received, in micros.

fields.name: metrics.average_cpm
fields.description: Average cost-per-thousand impressions (CPM), in micros.

fields.name: metrics.average_cpv
fields.description: The average amount you pay each time someone views your ad. The average CPV is defined by the total cost of all ad views divided by the number of views, in micros.

fields.name: metrics.conversions
fields.description: The number of conversions. This only includes conversion actions which include_in_conversions_metric attribute is set to true.

fields.name: metrics.conversions_value
fields.description: The sum of conversion values for the conversions included in the conversions field.

fields.name: metrics.cost_per_conversion
fields.description: The cost of ad interactions divided by all conversions, in micros.

fields.name: metrics.conversion_rate
fields.description: The number of conversions divided by the number of interactions.

fields.name: metrics.all_conversions
fields.description: The total number of conversions. This includes all conversions regardless of the value of include_in_conversions_metric.

fields.name: metrics.all_conversions_value
fields.description: The total value of all conversions.

fields.name: metrics.view_through_conversions
fields.description: The total number of view-through conversions. These happen when a customer sees an image or rich media ad, then later completes a conversion on your site without interacting with another ad.

fields.name: metrics.absolute_top_impression_percentage
fields.description: The percent of your ad impressions that are shown as the very first ad above the organic search results.

fields.name: metrics.top_impression_percentage
fields.description: The percent of your ad impressions that are shown anywhere above the organic search results.

fields.name: metrics.search_impression_share
fields.description: The impressions you've received on the Search Network divided by the estimated number of impressions you were eligible to receive.

fields.name: metrics.search_absolute_top_impression_share
fields.description: The number that results from dividing your absolute top impression share by your exact match eligible absolute top impression share.

fields.name: metrics.search_top_impression_share
fields.description: The impressions you've received in the top location (anywhere above the organic search results) compared to the estimated number of impressions you were eligible to receive in the top location.

fields.name: metrics.search_budget_lost_impression_share
fields.description: The estimated percent of times that your ad was eligible to show on the Search Network but didn't because your budget was too low.

fields.name: metrics.search_rank_lost_impression_share
fields.description: The estimated percentage of impressions on the Search Network that your ads didn't receive due to poor Ad Rank.

fields.name: metrics.content_impression_share
fields.description: The impressions you've received on the Display Network divided by the estimated number of impressions you were eligible to receive.

fields.name: metrics.content_budget_lost_impression_share
fields.description: The estimated percent of times that your ad was eligible to show on the Display Network but didn't because your budget was too low.

fields.name: metrics.content_rank_lost_impression_share
fields.description: The estimated percentage of impressions on the Display Network that your ads didn't receive due to poor Ad Rank.

fields.name: metrics.video_views
fields.description: The number of times your video ads were viewed.

fields.name: metrics.video_view_rate
fields.description: The number of views your TrueView video ad receives divided by its number of impressions.

fields.name: metrics.video_quartile_p25_rate
fields.description: Percentage of impressions where the viewer watched 25% of your video.

fields.name: metrics.video_quartile_p50_rate
fields.description: Percentage of impressions where the viewer watched 50% of your video.

fields.name: metrics.video_quartile_p75_rate
fields.description: Percentage of impressions where the viewer watched 75% of your video.

fields.name: metrics.video_quartile_p100_rate
fields.description: Percentage of impressions where the viewer watched all of your video.

fields.name: metrics.interactions
fields.description: The number of interactions. An interaction is the main user action associated with an ad format—clicks for text and shopping ads, views for video ads, and so on.

fields.name: metrics.interaction_rate
fields.description: How often people interact with your ad after it is shown to them.

fields.name: metrics.engagement_rate
fields.description: How often people engage with your ad after it's shown to them.

fields.name: metrics.engagements
fields.description: The number of engagements. An engagement occurs when a viewer expands your Lightbox ad.

fields.name: metrics.active_view_cpm
fields.description: Average cost of viewable impressions (active_view_impressions), in micros.

fields.name: metrics.active_view_ctr
fields.description: Active view measurable clicks divided by active view viewable impressions.

fields.name: metrics.active_view_impressions
fields.description: A measurement of how often your ad has become viewable on a Display Network site.

fields.name: metrics.active_view_measurability
fields.description: The ratio of impressions that could be measured by Active View over the number of served impressions.

fields.name: metrics.active_view_measurable_cost_micros
fields.description: The cost of the impressions you received that were measurable by Active View, in micros.

fields.name: metrics.active_view_measurable_impressions
fields.description: The number of times your ads are appearing on placements in positions where they can be seen.

fields.name: metrics.active_view_viewability
fields.description: The percentage of time when your ad appeared on an Active View enabled site (measurable impressions) and was viewable (viewable impressions).

fields.name: metrics.bounce_rate
fields.description: Percentage of clicks where the user only visited a single page on your site.

fields.name: metrics.gmail_forwards
fields.description: The number of times the ad was forwarded to someone else as a message.

fields.name: metrics.gmail_saves
fields.description: The number of times someone has saved your Gmail ad to their inbox as a message.

fields.name: metrics.gmail_secondary_clicks
fields.description: The number of clicks to the landing page on the expanded state of Gmail ads.

fields.name: metrics.phone_calls
fields.description: Number of offline phone calls.

fields.name: metrics.phone_impressions
fields.description: Number of offline phone impressions.

fields.name: metrics.phone_through_rate
fields.description: Number of phone calls received (phone_calls) divided by the number of times your phone number is shown (phone_impressions).

fields.name: metrics.relative_ctr
fields.description: Your clickthrough rate (Ctr) divided by the average clickthrough rate of all advertisers on the websites that show your ads.

fields.name: metrics.value_per_all_conversions
fields.description: The value of all conversions divided by the number of all conversions.

fields.name: metrics.value_per_conversion
fields.description: The value of conversions divided by the number of conversions.

fields.name: metrics.sk_ad_network_conversions
fields.description: The number of iOS Store Kit Ad Network conversions.

fields.name: segments.date
fields.description: Date to which metrics apply. yyyy-MM-dd format, for example, 2018-04-17.

fields.name: segments.week
fields.description: Week as defined as Monday through Sunday, and represented by the date of Monday. Formatted as yyyy-MM-dd.

fields.name: segments.month
fields.description: Month as represented by the date of the first day of a month. Formatted as yyyy-MM-dd.

fields.name: segments.quarter
fields.description: Quarter as represented by the date of the first day of a quarter. Uses the calendar year for quarters, for example, the second quarter of 2018 starts on 2018-04-01. Formatted as yyyy-MM-dd.

fields.name: segments.year
fields.description: Year, formatted as yyyy.

fields.name: segments.day_of_week
fields.description: Day of the week, for example, MONDAY.

fields.name: segments.hour
fields.description: Hour of day as a number between 0 and 23, inclusive.

fields.name: segments.month_of_year
fields.description: Month of the year, for example, JANUARY.

fields.name: segments.device
fields.description: Device to which metrics apply.

fields.name: segments.ad_network_type
fields.description: Ad network type.

fields.name: segments.click_type
fields.description: Click type.

fields.name: segments.conversion_action
fields.description: Resource name of the conversion action.

fields.name: segments.conversion_action_category
fields.description: Conversion action category.

fields.name: segments.conversion_action_name
fields.description: Conversion action name.

fields.name: segments.external_conversion_source
fields.description: External conversion source.

fields.name: segments.slot
fields.description: Position of the ad.

fields.name: segments.search_term_match_type
fields.description: Match type of the keyword that triggered the ad, including variants.

fields.name: segments.keyword.info.text
fields.description: The text of the keyword.

fields.name: segments.keyword.info.match_type
fields.description: The match type of the keyword.

fields.name: segments.search_engine_results_page_type
fields.description: Type of the search engine results page.

fields.name: segments.product_channel
fields.description: Channel of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_channel_exclusivity
fields.description: Channel exclusivity of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_condition
fields.description: Condition of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_item_id
fields.description: Item ID of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_title
fields.description: Title of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_brand
fields.description: Brand of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_merchant_id
fields.description: Merchant ID of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_store_id
fields.description: Store ID of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_type_l1
fields.description: Type (1st level) of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_type_l2
fields.description: Type (2nd level) of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_type_l3
fields.description: Type (3rd level) of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_type_l4
fields.description: Type (4th level) of the product.

fields.name: segments.product_type_l5
fields.description: Type (5th level) of the product.
